run_purpose: Observe temporal corroboration (time windows, strength, conflicts); diagnostic only — not used for achieved.

cases.expected_behavior: Video frames (~0,3,6s sampling) and runtime log line with t≈1s + collision keyword in same 5s window as first frame → expect temporal_alignment_strength at least medium, reasoning includes log near frame, few or no temporal conflicts.
Log timestamp very large vs video frame times → expect split windows; flags like video_frames_without_nearby_runtime_activity and/or runtime_logs_without_temporal_visual_support.
MP4 only (no logs, no screenshots) → video_frames_without_nearby_runtime_activity; global strength weak (frame-only).
Dense runtime.log with parsed timestamps, no video → runtime_logs_without_temporal_visual_support.
First sampled video frame (~0s), screenshot filename with 1s hint, log t≈0.75 + collision → same 5s window, temporal_alignment_strength strong; both reasoning strings present.
